lines.text: Freight revenue of $88,000,000 recognized over time as transportation services are rendered per ASC 606 606-10-25-19, 606-10-55-21.
Entity reports as principal for logistics brokerage and managed transportation transactions per ASC 606 606-10-55-36, 606-10-55-40.
Bill-and-hold arrangement (enabled true, goods ready true, amount $1,200,000) evaluated per ASC 606 606-10-25-7, 606-10-55-83.
Fuel hedge (notional $5,000,000, fair value $320,000, effectiveness 92%) accounted for per ASC 815 815-20-25-1, 815-20-35-2.
Fleet impairment for tractor fleet (carrying amount $45,000,000, fair value $44,000,000) per ASC 360 360-10-35-21, 360-10-50-3.
Terminal and equipment leases (8 leases, total liability $12,400,000) disclosed per ASC 842 842-20-50-1, 842-20-50-4.
Demurrage and detention revenue (demurrage $850,000, detention $620,000) recognized per ASC 606 606-10-32-2, 606-10-55-91.
Fuel surcharge revenue of $7,000,000 disclosed as variable consideration per ASC 606 606-10-32-2, 606-10-55-91.
